items.title: Police say kidnapped grandfather likely mistaken for crime network figure
items.description: Australian police say a Sydney grandfather was taken from his home by assailants who likely thought he was involved in a "criminal world."

items.title: Team USA athletes seek to break Olympic medal drought at Winter Games
items.description: Team USA is looking to get this week off to a golden start after failing to pick up any medals on Sunday. CBS News' Seth Doane reports from Italy.
